meta.purpose: Small-batch official/high-trust source audit for PL Commentary Bank before any database promotion.
meta.databasePromotionPolicy: Confirmed histories require explicit official/high-trust source support with athlete identity kept unambiguous. Ambiguous identity, incomplete context, and same-name rows without enough current-roster linkage stay outside data/database.json. Do not infer achievements from name similarity.

batchScope.reasonForAudit: Incremental adjacent-lot pass after Lot 79-80 addendum. This run checks a small F-group batch and avoids repeating prior Lot 79-80 work.
batchScope.openPrCheck: Open PR check before this run found only #111, a non-overlapping completion report generator that does not mutate data/database.json, data/research-candidates.json, or A4 print layout.
batchScope.writeScope: Research batch log only. No data/database.json, data/research-candidates.json, app runtime, CSS, generator logic, print template, A4 layout, or v5.9.6_LOCK changes.

sourceIndex.title: GitHub open PR check
sourceIndex.auditFinding: Only open PR found: #111 Add Numata completion report generator. Non-overlapping with athlete data mutation and A4 layout.

sourceIndex.auditFinding: No reliable official/high-trust result rows were located for Lot 81-83 in this narrow pass. General web hits were absent or irrelevant; no candidate row was created from weak search hits.

athletes.auditNotes: No database promotion. No same-name official/high-trust row was located in the limited official-source sweep performed in this run.
No database promotion. Searches included both the roster glyph form ⻯ and the common 竜 variant. No official/high-trust row was located in this narrow pass.
No database promotion. General web search returned irrelevant non-athlete material for similar names; nothing was added as a candidate.

notPromotedToDatabaseThisRun.reason: No official/high-trust confirmed histories were found for Lot 81-83 in this narrow pass. Empty histories are not evidence of no history; they remain simply unconfirmed in the current database.
notPromotedToDatabaseThisRun.safeNextStep: Continue with Lot 84-85 or perform a targeted official PDF text extraction pass if source PDFs become available locally.
